mapper.select: SELECT user_code AS userCode, u.company_id AS companyId, c.company_code AS companyCode, login_id AS loginId, password AS password, user_name AS userName, email AS email, phone_number AS phoneNumber, status AS status, profile_image AS profileImage, owner_yn AS ownerYn, admin_yn AS adminYn, web_notification_yn AS webNotificationYn, email_notification_yn AS emailNotificationYn, notification_area AS notificationArea, last_login_time AS lastLoginTime, group_id AS groupId FROM users u JOIN companies c ON u.company_id = c.company_id WHERE login_id = #{loginId}

SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM members m JOIN member_roles mr ON m.member_id = mr.member_id JOIN ROLES r ON mr.role_id = r.role_id JOIN role_permissions rp ON r.ROLE_ID = rp.ROLE_ID JOIN permissions p ON rp.permission_code = p.permission_code WHERE m.user_code = #{userCode}
